items.title: Guest Trust Clarity Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve guest booking confidence by clarifying total price, listing trust, host reputation, and cancellation explanation at the moment of decision.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase conversion by reducing trust and pricing ambiguity before booking.
Increase guest clarity about fees and cancellation tradeoffs.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat guest behavior through stronger first-booking confidence.

productBricks.change: Improve host trust, review summary, and policy clarity on listing pages.
Clarify fee and cancellation language in checkout.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated listing and checkout treatments.

items.title: New Host Fast Activation Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to reduce host setup friction with simpler authoring, more useful defaults, and better first-booking pricing guidance.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time to first booking by launching better-prepared listings sooner.
Increase live-listing conversion from setup starts.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase quality of new active supply by improving setup completeness.

productBricks.change: Reduce activation steps and clarify readiness.
Improve setup quality prompts and content guidance.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved host setup and authoring flows.

items.title: Operator Control and Recovery Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to give professional operators stronger delegated control, better portfolio issue visibility, and faster resolution workflows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase on-time readiness and check-in quality.
Reduce time spent waiting on case closure and financial reconciliation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve retention and growth of professional operators.

productBricks.change: Improve turnover coordination and reservation visibility.
